plan.name: GCP Spot Training with SkyPilot + Pulumi Infrastructure

context.summary: Deploy full GCP infrastructure (Cloud Run MLflow + Cloud SQL PostgreSQL + GCS + Artifact Registry) via Pulumi, then run Docker-based GPU training via SkyPilot with spot instance checkpointing and auto-resume. All same-region (europe-north1).

event.what: UpCloud MLflow + S3 deployed via Pulumi
MLflow artifact upload fails (v2.20 server vs v3.10 client)
MLflow server upgraded to v3.10.0 + multipart
Lambda sold out, switched to GCP

reviewer-feedback.item: Add MLFLOW_SERVER_VERSION to .env.example FIRST (P1.0, not P1.7)
Fix UpCloud Pulumi __main__.py line 235 to use MLFLOW_SERVER_VERSION var
NEW TASK: Build custom MLflow Docker image (psycopg2 + google-cloud-storage) for GAR
Use Cloud SQL Auth Proxy sidecar for Cloud Run (NOT public IP)
Add roles/artifactregistry.reader to IAM service account
Use pyproject.toml NOT requirements.txt (CLAUDE.md Rule 1: uv ONLY)
Add atomic checkpoint writes (temp + rename) for spot safety
Add checkpoint SHA256 integrity verification before torch.load()
Upgrade Cloud SQL to db-g1-small ($25/mo vs $15/mo for stability)
Verify GPU availability in europe-north1; add europe-west1 fallback
Change P2.1 from "create" to "update" — GCP YAML already exists
Address Optuna direct Cloud SQL access from SkyPilot VMs
Cloud Run min_instances=1 or accept cold starts; adjust cost estimate
Wire check_resume_state_task into train_flow (defined but never called)
Reconcile region in existing smoke_test_gcp.yaml (us-central1 vs europe-north1)

decisions.decision: Full Pulumi stack: GCS + Cloud SQL + Cloud Run MLflow + Artifact Registry
Spot instances with MOUNT_CACHED checkpointing from start
RunPod for dev (non-Docker), Lambda+GCP for staging+prod (Docker)
Zero hardcoding — all cloud config via Hydra groups overridable per lab/user
Ralph Loop skill for infra monitoring, TDD skill for code
MLflow version pinned to match client (3.10.0)

context.architecture: ``` GCP europe-north1 (all same region) ├── Artifact Registry → Docker images (minivess-base, same-region pulls) ├── GCS Buckets → mlflow-artifacts, dvc-data, checkpoints ├── Cloud SQL → PostgreSQL (MLflow backend + Optuna storage) ├── Cloud Run → MLflow 3.10.0 server (--artifacts-destination gs://) └── Compute Engine → SkyPilot spot VMs (T4/L4/A100, Docker containers) └── MOUNT_CACHED → Checkpoints → GCS (9.6x faster, async upload) ```

component.name: UpCloud MLflow
component.role: KEEP as fallback until GCP MLflow verified

component.name: UpCloud S3
component.role: KEEP for DVC data until migrated to GCS

component.name: UpCloud PostgreSQL
component.role: MLflow backend, KEEP until GCP Cloud SQL up

component.name: GHCR Docker images
component.role: KEEP as fallback, ADD GCP Artifact Registry as primary

task.title: Create GCP Pulumi project structure
task.description: Create deployment/pulumi/gcp/ directory with Pulumi Python project. Use @pulumi/gcp provider. Reference .env.example for all config values.

task.title: GCS Buckets
task.description: Create 3 GCS buckets in europe-north1: - minivess-mlflow-artifacts (MLflow artifact store) - minivess-dvc-data (DVC training data) - minivess-checkpoints (SkyPilot MOUNT_CACHED spot recovery) All with lifecycle rules (delete incomplete multipart uploads after 7 days).

task.title: Cloud SQL PostgreSQL
task.description: Create Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance in europe-north1: - Tier: db-f1-micro (0.6 GB RAM, shared vCPU) — cheapest - Storage: 10 GB SSD - Databases: mlflow, optuna - Users: mlflow_user (password from .env) - Public IP with authorized networks (SkyPilot VMs + local dev)

task.title: Artifact Registry (Docker)
task.description: Create Artifact Registry Docker repo in europe-north1: - Repository: minivess - Format: Docker - Push minivess-base:latest image to GAR - Update SkyPilot YAML to use GAR image_id (same-region = fast pulls)
task.commands: gcloud artifacts repositories create minivess --repository-format=docker --location=europe-north1 docker tag minivess-base:latest europe-north1-docker.pkg.dev/minivess-mlops/minivess/base:latest docker push europe-north1-docker.pkg.dev/minivess-mlops/minivess/base:latest

task.title: Cloud Run MLflow Server
task.description: Deploy MLflow 3.10.0 on Cloud Run in europe-north1: - Image: ghcr.io/mlflow/mlflow:v3.10.0 (with psycopg2-binary, boto3, google-cloud-storage) - Backend: Cloud SQL PostgreSQL (via Cloud SQL Proxy or public IP) - Artifacts: gs://minivess-mlflow-artifacts (GCS, NOT proxied) - Auth: basic-auth (same as UpCloud) - Env: MLFLOW_ENABLE_PROXY_MULTIPART_UPLOAD=true, MLFLOW_SERVER_ALLOWED_HOSTS=* - CRITICAL: MLflow version pinned via MLFLOW_SERVER_VERSION in .env.example
task.env-vars: MLFLOW_SERVER_VERSION=3.10.0 MLFLOW_GCP_URI=(Cloud Run URL, output by Pulumi) MLFLOW_GCP_USERNAME=admin MLFLOW_GCP_PASSWORD=(generated)
task.validation: curl -u admin:$PASS $MLFLOW_GCP_URI/health → OK curl -u admin:$PASS $MLFLOW_GCP_URI/api/2.0/mlflow/experiments/search → JSON

task.title: IAM Service Account
task.description: Create service account for SkyPilot VMs: - Roles: Compute Instance Admin, Storage Object Admin, Cloud SQL Client - Used by SkyPilot for VM provisioning + GCS access + Cloud SQL access

task.title: Update .env.example
task.description: Add GCP section to .env.example with all new variables. Pin MLFLOW_SERVER_VERSION=3.10.0 as single source of truth. Update SKYPILOT_DEFAULT_CLOUD from lambda to gcp.

task.title: Create GCP SkyPilot YAML
task.description: Create deployment/skypilot/smoke_test_gcp.yaml targeting europe-north1: - image_id: docker:europe-north1-docker.pkg.dev/minivess-mlops/minivess/base:latest - accelerators: {T4: 1, L4: 1, A100: 1} (cheapest first) - use_spot: true - disk_tier: best (SSD for MOUNT_CACHED) - MLflow URI: GCP Cloud Run URL (same-region) - DVC: GCS bucket (same-region)

task.title: Push Docker image to GAR
task.description: Tag and push minivess-base:latest to GCP Artifact Registry. Verify same-region pull speed (should be 1-3 min for 20 GB vs 10-60 min from GHCR).
task.commands: gcloud auth configure-docker europe-north1-docker.pkg.dev docker tag minivess-base:latest europe-north1-docker.pkg.dev/minivess-mlops/minivess/base:latest docker push europe-north1-docker.pkg.dev/minivess-mlops/minivess/base:latest

task.title: Upload DVC data to GCS
task.description: Copy MiniVess training data from UpCloud S3 to GCS: - gsutil -m cp -r s3://minivess-dvc-data/* gs://minivess-dvc-data/ - Or: dvc push -r gcs (add GCS as DVC remote) Same-region data access = faster DVC pulls during setup.

task.title: Smoke test: sam3_vanilla on GCP T4 spot
task.description: Launch sam3_vanilla smoke test on GCP T4 spot in europe-north1. Verify: Docker pull, DVC data, training, MLflow metrics + artifact upload. This is THE critical test: does the 910 MB .pth upload to GCS via MLflow?
task.success-criteria: - Cluster provisions in europe-north1 with T4 spot - Docker image pulled from GAR (same-region, fast) - DVC data pulled (UpCloud S3 initially, then GCS) - Training completes (2 epochs, 1 fold, 4 volumes) - MLflow metrics logged to Cloud Run MLflow - CRITICAL: 910 MB .pth artifact uploaded successfully (GCS backend) - Zero HTTP 500 errors
task.ralph-loop: Activate /ralph-loop --model sam3_vanilla --cloud gcp Monitor, diagnose failures, fix, relaunch.

task.title: Add MOUNT_CACHED checkpointing to SkyPilot YAML
task.description: Add GCS bucket mounting with MOUNT_CACHED for checkpoint persistence: ```yaml file_mounts: /checkpoints: name: minivess-checkpoints mode: MOUNT_CACHED ``` Checkpoints saved to local SSD → async upload to GCS (9.6x faster).

task.title: Implement checkpoint resume in train_flow.py
task.description: Modify training flow to load latest checkpoint on startup: 1. At fold start, check /checkpoints/ for existing .pth files 2. If found, load state dict and resume from saved epoch 3. Log resume event to MLflow (upstream_checkpoint tag) 4. Continue training from saved epoch (not restart from 0)

task.title: Test spot preemption simulation
task.description: Simulate spot preemption during training: 1. Launch training on GCP spot (longer run: 10 epochs) 2. After 5 epochs, simulate preemption: gcloud compute instances simulate-maintenance-event INSTANCE --zone ZONE 3. Verify: SkyPilot detects preemption → provisions new VM → resumes from checkpoint 4. Verify: training continues from epoch 5, not epoch 0 5. Verify: final metrics are correct (not corrupted by resume)
task.success-criteria: - Preemption detected by SkyPilot - New VM provisioned automatically - Checkpoint loaded from GCS MOUNT_CACHED - Training resumes from correct epoch - Final model quality matches non-preempted baseline

task.title: Update train_production.yaml with GCP primary
task.description: Update production SkyPilot YAML: - Primary: GCP spot (europe-north1, T4/L4/A100) - Fallback 1: Lambda on-demand (A10/A100, when available) - Fallback 2: AWS spot (if configured by user) All using Docker images from respective registries.

task.title: Create Hydra cloud config groups
task.description: Implement the configs/cloud/ + configs/lab/ + configs/user/ override system from the hydra-config-verification-report.md plan.

files.modify: configs/base.yaml — add cloud, lab, user defaults

task.title: AWS + Azure recipe YAMLs for academic labs
task.description: Create ready-made SkyPilot YAMLs for labs with AWS/Azure credits. Zero code changes needed — just set API keys in .env.

execution-order.step: 2. P1.0: Add MLFLOW_SERVER_VERSION=3.10.0 to .env.example (R1, single source of truth)
3. P1.1: Create Pulumi GCP project (pyproject.toml NOT requirements.txt per R6)
4. P1.2+P1.3+P1.4+P1.6 in PARALLEL: GCS buckets, Cloud SQL (db-g1-small per R9), Artifact Registry, IAM (R5: add artifactregistry.reader)
5. P1.4b NEW: Build custom MLflow Docker image (psycopg2 + google-cloud-storage) → push to GAR (R3)
6. P1.5: Deploy Cloud Run MLflow (Cloud SQL Auth Proxy sidecar per R4, min_instances=1 per R13)
8. P2.1+P2.2 in PARALLEL: Update GCP SkyPilot YAML (R11, R15: europe-north1 default) + Push training Docker image to GAR
9. P2.3: Upload DVC data to GCS (add gcs DVC remote)
10. P2.4: Smoke test — EVERYTHING on GCP (GAR image, GCS data, Cloud Run MLflow) via /ralph-loop
11. P3.1: Add MOUNT_CACHED checkpointing with atomic writes (R7) + SHA256 verification (R8)
12. P3.2: Wire check_resume_state_task into train_flow (R14 — already defined, never called)
14. P4: Multi-provider failover + Hydra config groups

cold-start-instructions.prerequisite: GPUS_ALL_REGIONS quota >= 1 (check: gcloud compute project-info describe)
